_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox offense hits unacceptable low: worst home OPS since 1968
items.snark: 56 runs through 19 home games, congrats on making Fenway play like the Grand Canyon in reverse.

items.headline: Red Sox drop finale 4-1 to Rays after another poor hitting day at Fenway
items.snark: Sox had nine men left on base and somehow zero ability to score, Fenway turning into a pitchers park for the wrong team.

items.headline: Patriots schedule release set for Thursday May 14 at 8 PM, leaks rolling in
items.snark: NFL treating schedule release like the Oscars, just tell us when we play the Jets so we can plan the parade.

items.headline: Patriots rookie Caleb Lomu takes all left tackle reps at Saturday minicamp
items.snark: First-rounder getting first-team reps at LT, quick somebody alert the analytics crew this is how drafting works.
